_comment: Industry benchmark base rates used as calibration anchors and as the 'benchmark' column in reports. Stage semantics: gate = P(engage with teaser | delivered/impressed), click = P(click | engaged), convert = P(convert | clicked). Sources: aggregate industry reports (Mailchimp/Klaviyo email benchmarks, WordStream ad benchmarks) — replace with your own vertical's numbers or fit from a real campaign via `calibrate`.
